summary: Comprehensive coverage of core functionality (Secret construction, categorization into urgency levels, config parsing, markdown/JSON formatting, workflow validation). Strong boundary condition testing (exact window edges, negative days). Gaps: missing tests for empty secrets list, negative rotation_policy_days, specific field-level errors (rotation_policy_days, last_rotated), invalid reference_date in config, exit code behavior (sys.exit(2) on expired), CLI argument parsing, and special characters. Design is well-organized with clear test names and logical grouping, but underutilizes pytest patterns—helper functions (_make_config, _get_statuses) repeated across classes should be @pytest.fixture, and boundary tests could use @pytest.mark.parametrize. Would catch most regressions in happy path and common errors, but some edge cases would slip through.
